stories.title: Shohei Ohtani — 6 Scoreless Innings, 6 Ks in 2026 Pitching Debut

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani's 2026 pitching debut:

6 innings. 1 hit. 0 runs. 6 strikeouts. 98 mph.

He also batted and was walked twice.

This is what two Tommy John surgeries and full recovery looks like.

Dodgers win 4-1.

#Dodgers #BallparkBanter #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Ohtani gave up ONE hit in 6 innings last night.

A double in the 4th. A runner stranded at second.

That's it. That's the whole story.

He's back. He's elite. Dodgers fans, enjoy this.

#Dodgers #BallparkBanter #MLB

stories.title: Dodgers Complete Historic Trio — Yamamoto Starts Tonight vs. Guardians

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Sasaki pitched Monday.
Ohtani pitched Tuesday.
Yamamoto pitches TONIGHT.

Three straight Japanese-born starters for the Dodgers — first time in MLB history, per Elias.

The sport has never seen anything like this.

#Dodgers #BallparkBanter #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The Dodgers are casually sending three of the best pitchers on the planet out — back to back to back.

Sasaki. Ohtani. Yamamoto.

This isn't a rotation. It's a problem for every team in baseball.

#Dodgers #BallparkBanter #MLB

article.headline: Sasaki, Ohtani, Yamamoto: Dodgers Complete the First Japanese Pitcher Trilogy in MLB History

stories.title: Braves' Rotation in Crisis — Three Starters on IL, Sale and Lopez Carrying the Load

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Atlanta Braves rotation in April 2026:

❌ Strider (oblique)
❌ Schwellenbach (IL, out until summer)
❌ Waldrep (IL, out until summer)
❌ Wentz (torn ACL)

✅ Sale
✅ Lopez

They won 4-0 yesterday anyway.

#Braves #BallparkBanter #MLB

stories.title: Aaron Judge and the 400 HR Chase — It's a Matter of When

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge: 368 career home runs.

32 away from 400.

His first HR of 2026 came after an ABS challenge overturned a strike call.

Even the robot umpire is part of his legend now.

#Yankees #BallparkBanter #MLB

Wednesday's MLB winners:

Astros 8, Red Sox 1
Rangers 8, Orioles 5
Cubs 7, Angels 2
Braves 4, Athletics 0
Rays 3, Brewers 2 ← Brewers' first loss

April is already going.

#BallparkBanter #MLB #Baseball

April is wild.

stories.title: Blue Jays 50 Ks — The Record That Defined Opening Week

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
The Blue Jays struck out 50 batters in their first 3 games.

Old MLB record: 46 (2020 Reds).

New record: 50. Blue Jays. In their 50th anniversary season.

Manager John Schneider: "Pretty round number."

#BlueJays #BallparkBanter #MLB
